sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15803" key="a)rusa/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρῠσάνη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰρ] <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[σᾱ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n15803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρύταινα</ref></xr>, Timo <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
